name: @unfixed3854/pi-usage
description_en: A pi extension that displays active model provider subscription quota usage in the status bar. Supports z.ai (GLM) and OpenAI Codex with provider-specific quota percentages, plan levels, and reset times. Updates every 60 seconds during agent runs.
description_zh: Pi 扩展，在状态栏显示活动模型提供商订阅配额使用情况。支持 z.ai (GLM) 和 OpenAI Codex，带有提供商特定的配额百分比、计划级别和重置时间。在代理运行期间每 60 秒更新一次
